# Music Pusher Vendor Assets

These files are bundled locally so the Music Pusher UI does not depend on
runtime CDN access for security, reliability, or network speed.

- `three-0.161.0.module.min.js`
  - Source: `three@0.161.0/build/three.module.min.js`
  - License: MIT, retained in the file header.
- `postprocessing-6.35.6.min.js`
  - Source: `postprocessing@6.35.6/build/postprocessing.min.js`
  - License: Zlib, retained in the file header.
